en: Something with families could go home early. You look like you were wearing a wedding ring out in Los Angeles.
ko: 가족과 관련된 일로 일찍 집에 갈 수 있어요.

en: I thought maybe you had a family. No. No family.
You want to talk to me? Let's talk face-to-face.
All right. I'm at my suite at the Stuyvesant Arms, room 3113.
In the morning, I leave for Las Vegas for the weekend.
You think you're gonna get me again? You're not going to Vegas.
ko: 다시 저를 잡을 수 있을 거라고 생각해요?

en: You're not in the Stuyvesant Arms. You'd love for me to send out 20 agents Christmas Eve,
divide you into your hotel, knock down the door so you can make fools out of us all.
I'm really sorry if I made a fool out of you. I really am.
ko: 당신을 바보로 만든 것 같아 정말 미안해요. 정말로요.

en: Uh-uh, no. No, no. You do not feel sorry for me.
The truth is, I knew it was you. Now, maybe I didn't get the cuffs on you, but I knew.
People only know what you tell them, Carl.
ko: 사람들은 당신이 말하는 것만 알아요, 칼.

en: Well, then tell me this, Barry Allen Secret Service.
ko: 그럼 이걸 말해 보세요, 배리 앨린슨.
